_README: STAGED settings.json snippet for the current-session Fable contract (do not arm it from an agent run).
Apply the hook below to a project settings file only after confirming it will govern the intended
new session. It validates that invocation's own acceptance and balance receipts. It never selects
a model, retunes a session, signals a process, or changes any co-equal peer's continuation state.
ADD the guard command to the EXISTING SessionStart hook array (append, do not replace the
session-orient entry already there). The command below is the exact validated block.
